Name: Elements of AI
OneLiner: The best-known completely free intro to AI concepts for non-programmers — no math background assumed.

Name: Building AI
OneLiner: The follow-up to Elements of AI — the math and code behind AI methods, still fully free.

Name: Machine Learning with Python
OneLiner: Project-based ML fundamentals using TensorFlow, from freeCodeCamp's curriculum.

Name: Kaggle Learn: Intro to Machine Learning
OneLiner: Short, hands-on micro-course with real notebooks and datasets.

Name: Kaggle Learn: Intro to Deep Learning
OneLiner: Neural networks fundamentals via Kaggle's notebook-based micro-courses.

Name: Practical Deep Learning for Coders
OneLiner: Code-first deep learning course, widely respected in the ML community — top-down, not theory-first.
CertificateNote: No formal certificate, but among the most highly regarded free deep learning courses available.

Name: ChatGPT Prompt Engineering for Developers
OneLiner: Short, hands-on course on writing effective prompts, taught with OpenAI's own API.

Name: LangChain for LLM Application Development
OneLiner: Build real LLM-backed apps with LangChain — free short course, code-along notebooks.

Name: AI Agents for Beginners
OneLiner: Free, open-source 12-lesson curriculum on building AI agents, maintained on GitHub.
CertificateNote: No certificate — self-paced open curriculum with code samples.

Name: Generative AI for Everyone
OneLiner: Andrew Ng's non-technical explainer on what generative AI can and can't do.
CertificateNote: Free to audit; Coursera's certificate requires payment or financial aid approval.

Name: Introduction to Generative AI
OneLiner: Google's own short intro course, free with a Cloud Skills Boost account.
CertificateNote: Free shareable skill badge via Credly.

Name: AI Fundamentals
OneLiner: Free self-paced AI/tech courses aimed at career switchers, with completion badges.

Name: CS50's Introduction to Artificial Intelligence with Python
OneLiner: Harvard's rigorous AI course covering search, knowledge, uncertainty, ML and neural networks.
CertificateNote: Free to audit in full; edX's verified certificate is paid.

Name: MIT 6.034 Artificial Intelligence (OpenCourseWare)
OneLiner: Full MIT lecture series, notes and assignments, completely free — OCW never issues certificates.
CertificateNote: MIT OCW doesn't issue certificates for any course.
